title: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants
abstract: Adobe's plan to stick AI assistants into all of its Creative Cloud suite is now fully underway, with new chatbots now rolling out to its biggest editing and design apps. As part of a public beta launc
abstract_zh: friends, 如果你是个搞设计和视频剪辑的小能手，那你一定得试试 **Photoshop and Premiere’s AI Assistants**！写周报时突然卡壳？调Bug时头大如斗？别急，这个AI助手不仅能帮你快速整理素材、自动匹配音乐，还能在你最绝望的时刻，瞬间生成一个惊艳的画面。简直不要太强！快来一起玩耍吧！
